c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C1: LiveMode raise in Initialize; status_fields strings PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES; no broker adapter; exception text 'LIVE_PATH_DETECTED: s10-cross-asset-donchian-no-pyramid-reparam-cap-nq-gc-zn-cl is paper-only forever'
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C2: engine-truth run_id; Initialize date cross-check; window ceiling; algo_version=s10_d2_v0_1_0; phase_prefix=PHASE2-S10-D2-XAD-RC; predecessor_seal=plan_lock_seal
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C3: all universal + futures-specific counters; pyramid_state_machine_violation_count must be 0 (vestigial under max_units=1); per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count must be 0
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C4: per-market RTH windows; eod_cancel == rth_close; LIMIT discipline; quote_age + spread checks
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C5: known_contract_rolls + known_expirations from CME calendar; expiry blackout 5d before
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C6: schema_id = sparta.external_research_hunter.s10_d2_cross_asset_donchian_no_pyramid_reparam_cap_in_sample_diagnostic.v1; cagr from engine; win_rate literal when n<100; starting_cash=$500,000 baked into performance_summary fields; per-market unit-count audit (must always be 0 or 1 under max_units=1)
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C7: closed enum {FAIL_SAFETY, INSUFFICIENT_SAMPLE, READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST}; min_closed_trades=100; K-gates run in parallel; no enum extension
c1_c8_required_evidence_summary.C8: park-on-weak-performance rule; revival requires fresh s11-* candidate_record_id; live-block permanent; no s10-D2 re-run under same candidate_record_id with different parameters

citation_block:
# Inherits Phase 2 safety contracts (C1-C8) from:
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.md  (sha 1812f4854a23e7a148257c88133042ea1e383725f4875e762475260ae3658981)
#   docs/phase2_safety_contract_template.json (sha 695a9fb6e0cb6ae5395d467471f2c55d3d90a7030443ca87e4c1d220335f4a32)
# Adapts each C-contract to s10-D2 specifics:
#   - canonical_record_id: s10-cross-asset-donchian-no-pyramid-reparam-cap-nq-gc-zn-cl
#   - starting_cash_mnq_equivalent = $500,000 (single delta from s8-D1)
#   - max_units_per_market = 1 (no-pyramid invariant; s8-D1 preserved)
#   - portfolio cap structurally non-binding at 4 markets x 1 unit
#   - AMB6 filter NONE; cross-asset 4-market universe NQ/GC/ZN/CL
#   - Databento local cache reuse only (s8-D1 cache); no fresh fetch
#   - in-sample 2013-01-01..2022-12-30; OOS noted but not inspected
# Does NOT revive any parked or rejected candidate (S8-D1, S7-D1, B005_001, NKE, D5).

fail_closed_when: LiveMode exception is missing, conditionally bypassed, or weakened
Any status string is reduced to anything other than PAUSED / BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES
Any broker / exchange / wallet / API-key adapter appears in imports
required_evidence: main.py Initialize block contains: if self.LiveMode: raise Exception('LIVE_PATH_DETECTED: s10-cross-asset-donchian-no-pyramid-reparam-cap-nq-gc-zn-cl is paper-only forever; refuse to run in live mode.')
Local engine equivalent: if os.environ.get('LIVE_MODE') == '1' or any --live flag: raise the same exception.
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.trading_status == 'PAUSED'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.live_status == 'BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES'
Every diagnostic JSON output carries status_fields.backtest_diagnostic_only == True
No file under external_research_hunter/s10_d2_cross_asset_donchian_no_pyramid_reparam_cap_runner_harness/** imports broker/exchange adapters
C1_LiveMode_refusal.what_it_means_here: The s10-D2 runner (QC LEAN or local engine) MUST refuse to run in live mode. Both runtime paths are diagnostic-only. The runner does not import or instantiate any broker / exchange / Kraken / Binance / Alpaca adapter under any code path.

fail_closed_when: run_id hash inputs include any CONFIG-mutable date instead of engine date
Initialize cross-check is missing or bypassed
Engine EndDate > plan_lock_window_ceiling
report_seal_sha256 is missing OR is not byte-reproducible via external recompute
starting_cash_mnq_equivalent != 500000

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.plan_doc_sha256: <computed at BUILD time as canonical seal of this phase2_plan.json>

fail_closed_when: Any hard safety counter > 0 at run end without authoritative disposition
per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count > 0
pyramid_state_machine_violation_count > 0

futures_specific_counters.per_market_unit_count_invariant_violatio: int; under max_units_per_market=1, this MUST always be 0; non-zero = severe state-machine violation
futures_specific_counters.pyramid_state_machine_violation_count: int; under max_units=1, any second-unit add attempt = violation; must be 0

universal_counters.data_quality_warning_count: int; NaN, zero-volume, gap > 0.5% bars dropped + logged
universal_counters.session_boundary_warning_count: int; bar straddling RTH boundary; fail-closed

C4_rth_execution_discipline.boundary_alignment_rule: rth_safe_window_close == eod_cancel_time per market; misalignment is forbidden.
fail_closed_when: eod_cancel_time > rth_safe_window_close for any market
MarketOnClose order submitted for an opening unit
Non-RTH bars enter the Donchian channel computation
C4_rth_execution_discipline.limit_order_discipline: Opening orders MUST be LimitOrder OR market-on-next-open per spec entry_timing (ONO). MarketOnClose is forbidden for opens.

fail_closed_when: Position held across an expiration the runner did not explicitly roll
MarketOnClose submitted for a position close
ex_date / roll_date hardcoded outside CONFIG
operator_responsibilities: Maintain known_contract_rolls and known_expirations current for 2013-2022 in-sample window AND 2023-2025 OOS window
Source from CME group official calendar + Databento `definition` schema

required_config_fields_for_future_runner.known_contract_rolls: list[dict]; pre-populated from Databento `continuous` series metadata

fail_closed_when: schema_id silently bumped
win_rate emitted as a number when closed_trades_portfolio < verdict_min_closed_trades
cagr_pct computed from CONFIG dates
report_seal_sha256 missing or not byte-reproducible
max_units_observed_per_market_max > 1
second_unit_add_attempt_count > 0
starting_cash_invariant_attestation shows CONFIG value != 500000
performance_summary_required_fields_for_: cagr_pct (computed from engine StartDate/EndDate, NOT CONFIG)
starting_cash_invariant_attestation (must show CONFIG starting_cash == 500000 throughout run)

C7_verdict_semantics.closed_enum_invariant: Enum is closed; no new verdict may be added without a fresh _revN_ spec.
fail_closed_when: A new verdict outside the closed enum is silently introduced
READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is interpreted as live-ready in any downstream automation
Numeric win_rate emitted when n < threshold
C7_verdict_semantics.k_criteria_mapping_to_verdict_reasons: Per Tier-N spec rejection_gates K1..K12: even if VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST in the C7 enum, if K1/K2/K4/K6/K7/K8/K9/K10/K11/K12 fire, the candidate parks per Tier-N rejection_gates. C7 enum and Tier-N K-gates run in parallel; the candidate proceeds to OOS authorization ONLY if BOTH (VERDICT == READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST) AND (no K fires) AND (Tier-N acceptance gates A1..A10 all pass).
C7_verdict_semantics.never_means_live_ready: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST is a research label only; 6-gate live-block applies regardless.
verdict_precedence_high_to_low: non_rth_fill_warning_count > 0 OR rollover_violation_count > 0 OR pyramid_state_machine_violation_count > 0 OR per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count > 0 OR n_calculation_drift_detected_count > 0 -> FAIL_SAFETY
(closed_trades_portfolio >= 100) AND (no safety counter fires) -> READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (research label only; K-gates evaluated in parallel)

allowed_operational_statuses_for_s10_d2: READY_FOR_LONGER_BACKTEST (after a clean P6 in-sample run + P7 memo)
REJECT_FAST (K12 fires; DR2/DR3/DR5 on cost-stress matrix)
fail_closed_when: Auto-revival of a parked candidate
Modification of a parked s10-D2 record to claim better economics
Parking used as a soft path to live promotion
Threshold loosening or parameter iteration after seeing in-sample results
Re-running with starting_cash != 500000 under the s10-D2 namespace
permanent_attributes_unchanged_by_parkin: All advisory labels declared in Tier-N spec

transitions.revival: From any PARKED_*: requires a FRESH SEALED RESEARCH CYCLE under a NEW candidate_record_id (e.g. s11-* or later). Not a continuation of s10-D2. Old s10-D2 record stays parked permanently.

fail_closed_conditions_for_future_runner: Any C1 violation: LiveMode bypass / status string change / broker import
Any C2 violation: CONFIG/engine date divergence / window ceiling / seal recompute mismatch
Any C3 hard safety counter > 0 at run end (including per_market_unit_count_invariant_violation_count)
Any C4 violation: non-RTH bar in channel / MOC opens / eod_cancel misalignment
Any C5 violation: position held across expiry without explicit handling
Any C6 violation: schema_id bump / cagr from CONFIG / win_rate as number when n<100 / missing seal / max_units_observed > 1
Any C7 enum extension or live-ready interpretation
Any C8 weak-performance iteration / parking revival / threshold loosening / starting_cash != 500000 re-run under s10-D2 namespace
Any K1..K12 fire from Tier-N rejection_gates
Any S-STOP-11 fire: max_units_per_market != 1 detected anywhere
Any S-STOP-12 fire: any s8-D1 chain artifact byte sha changes during s10-D2 turn
Any S-STOP-13 fire: any s7-D1 chain artifact byte sha changes during s10-D2 turn
Any S-STOP-14 fire: starting_cash != 500000 detected anywhere
Any sealed parent sha drift detected mid-run
Any obsidian-trade-logger mutation, review_queue mutation, strategy_lab promotion
Any QC API call from the local-engine code path or vice versa

no_pyramid_mechanics_explicit_record.max_units_per_market_invariant: S-STOP-11 fires if max_units_per_market != 1 detected anywhere
no_pyramid_mechanics_explicit_record.n_calculation_source: Wilder ATR(20) of entry market at trigger bar (not fill bar); locked at unit entry

pre_flight_checklist_for_future_p6_in_sa: Verify S10 selection plan + availability analysis seals byte-stable
Verify all 20 s8-D1 chain artifacts byte-stable (S-STOP-12)
Verify all s7-D1 chain artifacts byte-stable (S-STOP-13)
Verify databento local cache: 480 IS + 144 OOS = 624 files / 172,454,306 bytes (s8-D1 cache re-used)
Verify in_sample_driver.py byte sha matches BUILD-time recorded sha
Verify AMB6 filter NONE at runtime (no filter functions wired)
Verify obsidian-trade-logger tracked-file count and byte-total baseline preserved at run start
Verify operator P6 authorization line received explicitly

single_delta_from_s8_d1_explicit_record.rationale: $500,000 is round number above empirical $476k NQ-clearing threshold from s8-D1 P9.5b sizing-skip cascade audit (median N=238.04 at OOS)
single_delta_from_s8_d1_explicit_record.starting_cash_invariant: S-STOP-14 fires if starting_cash != 500000 detected anywhere in CONFIG, runner constants, or runtime state.

what_future_p3_build_may_NOT_create: Any data/databento_cache/** mutation (cache is operator-managed; s10-D2 reuses s8-D1 cache)
Any strategy_lab approval or queue file
Any modification of existing s8-D1 / s7-D1 chain artifacts or runner harness files
Any Databento Historical client instantiation (db.Historical is forbidden in local-engine path)

files_in_runner_harness: main.py (QC LEAN entry; lazy QC import; LiveMode raise; CONFIG dict)
execution_guard.py (C1-C8 attestation runtime hooks; no broker imports)
in_sample_driver.py (local Databento DBN decoder + Donchian backtest; DIRECT REUSE of s8-D1 patched driver mechanic with starting_cash=500000 CONFIG override)
